case_title: CITBANK N.A. VS. ROSALIA C. PAET et al

docket_entries.description: FEES NOT PAID. ANSWER OF ROSALIA PAET FILED ON 8/30/11 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITBANK N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT PAET, ROSALIA C. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-22-2013

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT PAET, ROSALIA C. HEARING SET FOR OCT-10-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON OCT-10-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ROSALIA PAET'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206).
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE AS TO ROSALIA PAET FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITBANK N.A.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT PAET, ROSALIA C.
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT PAET, ROSALIA C.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
